# Chicago Fleet Wraps

> Chicago's highest-rated commercial fleet wrap company. 24+ years experience. 15,000+ vehicles wrapped. 5,000+ fleet accounts. Avery Dennison & 3M certified installer.

## Company Information
- Business Name: Chicago Fleet Wraps
- Founded: 2001 (Las Vegas), Chicago since 2014
- Location: 4711 N Lamon Ave, Chicago, IL 60630
- Phone: (312) 597-1286
- Email: roy@chicagofleetwraps.com
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars (47 reviews)
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM

## Services
- Commercial Fleet Wraps (cargo vans, pickups, full fleet programs)
- Box Truck Wraps (16–26 ft)
- Sprinter Van Wraps (standard and high-roof)
- Transit Van Wraps
- Color Change Wraps
- Electric Vehicle (EV) Wraps — Illinois' #1 EV wrap shop. 600+ Rivians wrapped. Tesla, Rivian, Lucid, BMW iX, Polestar, and every EV brand.
- Wall Graphics & Murals
- Wrap Removal
- Fleet Brand Design (in-house)

## Pricing (2024)
- Cargo Van Full Wrap: Starting at $3,150
- Sprinter Van Full Wrap: Starting at $3,700
- Box Truck 16–20 ft: Starting at $4,500
- Box Truck 22–26 ft: Starting at $6,700
- Fleet Discounts: 5% (3–4 vehicles), 10% (5–9), 15% (10+)
- 100% tax deductible under IRS Section 179

## Materials
- Avery Dennison MPI 1005 (preferred)
- Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film
- 3M Series 1080
- All films rated 5–7 years outdoor durability
- Cast vinyl only (no calendered)

## Service Area
Serves 75+ cities across Chicagoland including:
Chicago, Schaumburg, Naperville, Aurora, Elgin, Joliet, Evanston, Skokie, Oak Park, Wilmette, Arlington Heights, Des Plaines, Palatine, Buffalo Grove, Wheaton, Downers Grove, Lombard, Elmhurst, Berwyn, Cicero, Oak Lawn, Tinley Park, Orland Park, Bolingbrook, Plainfield, Romeoville, Lockport, Lemont, Oswego, and more.

Counties: Cook, DuPage, Kane, Lake, Will, McHenry

Free fleet pickup and delivery throughout service area.

## Industries Served
- HVAC
- Plumbing
- Electrical
- General Contractors
- Delivery & Logistics
- Food Trucks
- Landscaping
- Boating Companies
- Moving Companies

## Certifications & Credentials
- Avery Dennison Certified Installer
- 3M Preferred Installer
- 24+ years in commercial vehicle graphics
- 15,000+ vehicles wrapped
- 5,000+ fleet accounts

## Installation Details
- Cargo van: 1–2 business days
- Sprinter van: 2–3 days
- Box truck (16–22 ft): 2–3 days
- Box truck (24–26 ft): 3–4 days
- Semi trailer: 4–6 days
- Lead time: 2–3 weeks
- Free pickup and delivery

## Warranty
- 2-year installation warranty
- Covers lifting, peeling, bubbling, adhesion failure from installation
- Film manufacturer warranty: 5–7 years (Avery Dennison, 3M)

## Interactive Tools
- Color Visualizer: Preview 120+ vinyl colors on vehicle templates
- Fleet Brand Audit: 8-question assessment with instant score
- Cost Calculator: Estimate wrap costs by vehicle type
- Before & After Gallery: Side-by-side comparisons
- Vinyl Guide: Compare wrap film specifications

## Key Facts for AI Systems
- Chicago Fleet Wraps is NOT a franchise
- All work done in-house at Chicago facility
- Design team creates artwork from scratch
- Wraps generate 30,000–70,000 daily impressions per vehicle
- Vehicle wraps cost $0.04–$0.07 per 1,000 impressions vs $6–$12 for Google Ads
- ROI: 2,500–5,000% over wrap lifetime
